title: AstraZeneca's Truqap Clears Prostate Cancer Hurdle
headline: AstraZeneca's Truqap (capivasertib) received FDA approval on June 12, 2026 for PTEN-deficient metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer, marking a label expansion from its prior breast cancer indication.
key_facts: FDA approval June 12, 2026; PTEN-deficient mHSPC indication; label expansion from breast cancer

title: Sanofi's Tzield Gains FDA Expansion After Delay
headline: Sanofi's Tzield (teplizumab) received FDA accelerated approval expansion on June 12, 2026 for Stage 3 type 1 diabetes, following a 2-month regulatory delay.
key_facts: FDA accelerated approval June 12, 2026; Stage 3 T1D indication; 2-month delay before approval

title: Elicio KRAS Cancer Vaccine Fails Phase 2
headline: Elicio Therapeutics' KRAS-targeted cancer vaccine failed in Phase 2 testing, causing significant stock decline.
key_facts: Phase 2 failure; KRAS-mutant cancer target (likely pancreatic/colorectal)

title: CMS Targets Subcutaneous Drug Loophole
headline: CMS is proposing to close a Medicare drug price negotiation loophole affecting subcutaneous formulations of Merck's Keytruda and Bristol Myers Squibb's Opdivo, with billions at stake.
key_facts: Subcutaneous reformulation loophole; Keytruda ~$30B+ annual revenue; IRA negotiation implications

title: Traws Pharma Shares Plunge on MHRA Review
headline: Traws Pharma (TRAW) shares fell 18.2% to $1.05 in pre-market trading after deferring Phase 2a influenza study following a negative UK MHRA review.
key_facts: Stock fell 18.2% to $1.05; Phase 2a influenza study deferred; negative UK MHRA review

title: Takeda Presents Orexin Phase 3 Data
headline: Takeda presented new Phase 3 data supporting its lead orexin agonist program for narcolepsy.
key_facts: Phase 3 data presentation; orexin agonist program; narcolepsy indication

title: Gan & Lee Reports Phase 3 Obesity Successes
headline: Chinese drugmaker Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals reported Phase 3 obesity trial successes in an increasingly competitive GLP-1 market.
key_facts: Phase 3 obesity trial successes; GLP-1 program; Chinese competitor

title: Merck's Welireg Gains Adjuvant Kidney Cancer Nod
headline: Merck's Welireg (belzutifan) gained FDA approval for adjuvant use in kidney cancer, expanding its commercial opportunity.
key_facts: Adjuvant approval for kidney cancer; Welireg-Keytruda combination previously approved; post-surgical indication

title: J&J's Talvey Shows Myeloma Benefit Earlier
headline: Johnson & Johnson's Talvey (talquetamab) in combination with Darzalex Faspro demonstrated benefit in earlier-stage multiple myeloma, expanding its commercial potential.
key_facts: Talvey + Darzalex Faspro combination; earlier-stage multiple myeloma; MonumenTAL-3 trial data
